zh.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿瑟頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Atherton II於1347年出生在英國藍卡爾阿瑟頓時，他的父親Sir William de Atherton I, Knight22歲，母親Lady Jane or Joan Moberley25歲。他於大約1377年與Jane De Moberly在英國藍卡爾阿瑟頓結婚。他去世於1416年12月29日在英國藍卡爾李享年69歲。

zh-hans.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰藍卡爾阿瑟頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Atherton II于1347年出生在英国藍卡爾阿瑟頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Atherton I, Knight22岁，母亲Lady Jane or Joan Moberley25岁。他于大约1377年与Jane De Moberly在英国藍卡爾阿瑟頓结婚。他去世于1416年12月29日在英国藍卡爾李享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Atherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place near Manchester named Atherton, from the Old English personal name Æthelhere + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.
English: habitational name from Hatherton, Staffordshire, from Old English haguthorn + dūn ‘the hill where hawthorn grows’.

English (East Anglia): topographic name from Middle English at ther doune ‘(dweller) on the hill’ (Old English æt thǣre dūne). Through confusion of -don and -ton, Attherdoune was altered to Atherton, Adderton, and Atterton.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Atherton II was born in 1347, in Atherton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William de Atherton I, Knight, was 22 and his mother, Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, was 25. He married Jane De Moberly about 1377, in Atherton, Lancashire, England. He died on 29 December 1416, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Atherton II est né en 1347, à Atherton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Atherton I, Knight, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jane De Moberly environ 1377, à Atherton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1416, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Atherton II 1347 in Atherton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Atherton I, Knight 22 und seine Mutter Lady Jane or Joan Moberley 25. Er hat um 1377 in Atherton, Lancashire, England Jane De Moberly geheiratet. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1416 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Leigh, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Atherton II è nato il nel 1347 nel Atherton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Atherton I, Knight, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jane De Moberly circa 1377, nel Atherton, Lancashire, England. Morì il 29 dicembre 1416, nel Leigh, Lancashire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Atherton IIが1347年にイギリスランカシュアイアアスエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Atherton I, Knightは22歳，母Lady Jane or Joan Moberleyは25歳であった。約1377年にイギリスランカシュアイアアスエルトンでJane De Moberlyと結婚した。彼は1416年12月29日にイギリスランカシュアイアレイグで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Atherton II(이)가 1347년 영국 랭카실르 앳헤르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Atherton I, Knight(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane or Joan Moberley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1377년 영국 랭카실르 앳헤르턴에서 Jane De Moberly(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1416년 12월 29일 영국 랭카실르 리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Atherton II nasceu em 1347, em Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Atherton I, Knight, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane De Moberly aproximadamente 1377, em Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1416, em Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Atherton II родился в 1347 г. в местности атиртон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Atherton I, Knight было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane De Moberly около 1377 г. в местности атиртон, ланкашир, Англия. Он умер 29 декабря 1416 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Atherton II nació en 1347, en Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Atherton I, Knight, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Jane or Joan Moberley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jane De Moberly aproximadamente 1377, en Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1416, en Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
